bugs.description: transitioning state stuck true when paywall is pushed from loadNextVerse — all swipes and save button permanently disabled on return
reproductionSteps: Swipe on message screen — triggers loadNextVerse
Paywall appears, user taps Not Now
Return to message screen — card is frozen, nothing responds to swipe
bugs.resolution: Reset transitioning to false before router.push('/paywall') in loadNextVerse

bugs.description: Save/discard swipe indicator badges on wrong sides — Save badge was left-anchored, Discard badge was right-anchored (opposite of Tinder-style convention)
reproductionSteps: Drag card to the right (save direction)
Save indicator appears on left side instead of right
bugs.resolution: Swapped: Save badge to right:24, Discard badge to left:24

bugs.description: transformOrigin CSS property used in envelope fold creases — not supported in React Native, silently ignored on iOS/Android
reproductionSteps: Open envelope screen on a real device
Fold crease lines don't rotate from their corners as intended
bugs.resolution: Removed transformOrigin properties from both fold crease Views

bugs.description: No escape UI on envelope screen when performCheckIn throws and result stays null — screen shows loading state indefinitely
reproductionSteps: Simulate a network or storage error in performCheckIn
Envelope screen shows indefinitely with no way to exit
bugs.resolution: Added error state render: when !loading && !result, show error message with Go home button

bugs.description: Duplicate FREE_CHECKINS_PER_DAY constant: src/constants/index.ts was updated to 10 but src/constants/theme.ts LIMITS still had value 3
Duplicate 'fetch' entry in UIBackgroundModes in app.json — results in redundant plist entry
bugs.resolution: Removed duplicate entry, array is now ['fetch']

bugs.description: Double-splash race: _layout.tsx held React tree as null for 1800ms while splash.tsx also ran its own 1800ms animation — independent timers on different clocks caused a blank-then-splash flicker
reproductionSteps: Native splash holds, then briefly black before in-app splash appears
bugs.resolution: Reduced minDelayDone timer in _layout.tsx from 1800ms to 200ms so splash.tsx owns all branded splash timing

bugs.description: Unused Dimensions import in onboarding.tsx — const { width } declared but never referenced
reproductionSteps: TypeScript strict mode — unused variable warning
bugs.resolution: Removed Dimensions from import and removed the const { width } declaration

bugs.description: emotions.tsx used router.replace('/paywall') — pressing back from paywall would exit the app instead of returning to the emotion picker
reproductionSteps: Tap back/Not Now — app exits or goes to home instead of emotions screen
bugs.resolution: Changed to router.push('/paywall') so back navigation returns to emotion picker

bugs.description: Paywall purchase buttons are no-ops — both Monthly and Annual Pressables have onPress={() => {}}. RevenueCat SDK is not called. No purchase can be processed.

Anti-repetition system non-functional — selector reads usageCount and lastUsed from static catalog.json which always returns 0 and null. No code path writes updated values back to storage. effectiveWeight() penalty logic is dead code.
reproductionSteps: Check in 10 times with the same emotion
Same verses can repeat because lastUsed is always null

bugs.description: Firebase auth used getAuth() which defaults to inMemoryPersistence in React Native — auth tokens lost on every cold app restart, users silently logged out
reproductionSteps: Fully close the app from the app switcher
Reopen — user is signed out and sees welcome screen
bugs.resolution: Replaced getAuth(app) with initializeAuth using getReactNativePersistence(AsyncStorage) — auth state now persists across app restarts

bugs.description: Duplicate AuthUser type definition — src/types/index.ts defined AuthUser without emailVerified; src/services/auth.ts defined its own local AuthUser with emailVerified. Consumers importing from @/types received wrong shape.
reproductionSteps: Access .emailVerified — TypeScript error, field does not exist on that type
bugs.resolution: Added emailVerified to canonical AuthUser in types/index.ts. Removed duplicate interface from auth.ts — now imports and re-exports from types.

bugs.description: canCheckIn() is permanently bypassed — always returns true. Free users get unlimited check-ins. TEMP comment marks pre-ship requirement. Must be re-enabled before App Store submission.
reproductionSteps: Perform more than 10 check-ins in one day

bugs.description: Module-level navigationChecked flag in index.tsx persisted for the entire JS session — after sign-out within the same session, the auth guard never re-ran and unauthenticated users could access the home screen
reproductionSteps: Sign out via Settings > Start over
Navigate to home tab — guard does not redirect to welcome
bugs.resolution: Replaced module-level let with useRef — flag resets on component unmount/remount so guard re-runs after each sign-out

bugs.description: New Google users skip faithIntroComplete check — name-saving was in an else-if chain before the faithIntro redirect, causing it to be swallowed for users with a displayName
bugs.resolution: Decoupled name-saving from the navigation chain — runs as a fire-and-forget side effect before navigation decisions

bugs.description: Settings 'Start over' cleared local data but did not sign out the Firebase user — user remained authenticated while being sent to onboarding, causing a confusing half-reset state
reproductionSteps: Go to Settings > Start over > Clear & restart
Firebase session remains active — welcome screen is bypassed on next launch
bugs.resolution: Added signOutUser() call before navigation in the destructive handler. Now routes to /welcome instead of /onboarding to match unauthenticated state.

bugs.description: faith-intro.tsx outer View had accessibilityLabel='Welcome screen' — incorrect label shown to screen readers
cancelAll() used cancelAllScheduledNotificationsAsync() — nukes every scheduled notification in the app, not just the daily reminder. Would silently cancel any future notifications added.
reproductionSteps: All notifications are removed, not just the daily reminder

bugs.description: scheduleDaily() passed invalid time strings (e.g. empty or non-HH:mm format) silently to parseInt — NaN values sent to expo-notifications trigger opaque native errors
reproductionSteps: No error thrown — NaN passed to notification trigger
bugs.resolution: Added regex guard: throws Error if time string doesn't match HH:mm format

bugs.description: package.json name was 'expo-init-temp' — leftover from Expo CLI scaffolding, misleading for EAS build metadata and CI tooling
welcome.tsx auth check uses synchronous getCurrentUser() before Firebase rehydrates session on cold launch — logged-in users briefly see welcome screen before redirect
reproductionSteps: Reopen — welcome screen flashes briefly before redirecting to home

bugs.description: register.tsx had no minimum password length validation before submitting to Firebase — single-character passwords would fail with opaque Firebase error rather than a clear client-side message
reproductionSteps: Enter a 1-character password on register screen
Firebase error returned instead of immediate UI validation
bugs.resolution: Added password.length < 6 check before submission with clear error message
